name: Sogn Sparebank
summary: Sogn Sparebank provides banking products and services in Norway. The company offers saving accounts; saving products comprising bank, fund, and retirement savings; and deposit pension products. It also provides loan products for cars and other vehicles, as well as other small loans; and insource products comprising children, auto, death, health, building, holiday home, income, critical health, disability, UNG, and other insurance. In addition, the company offers bell payment products; bank cards; and mobile and online banking services. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in √É¬Ördalstangen, Norway.
